    error_defs
  GENERATOR
    iree::runtime::py::loom::gen::c_errors

    "error_catalog.c"
  GENERATED_HDR_FLAGS
    "--header"
  GENERATED_HDRS
    "error_catalog.h"
  ARGS
    "--catalog-symbol=loom_wasm_error_catalog"

)
